title: spergula arvensis var. vulgaris
intro: Spergula arvensis var. vulgaris, also known as common spurrey or weed spurrey, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and act as a diuretic to help with urinary issues. Spergula arvensis var. vulgaris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
